disambiguated.context: When I first moved to college, I was surprised that both my roommates, a Nigerian boy and a Sri Lankan boy, actually used to write detailed letters to their parents back home and not talk as much on the phone. This was for very different reasons though. The Nigerian boy was doing it purely as an exercise to improve writing skills but the Sri Lankan boy often had connectivity issues back home.
disambiguated.question: Who was using letters to improve their writing skills?

final.reason: The text explicitly states the Nigerian boy was writing letters “purely as an exercise to improve writing skills.”
